title: Project Manager – Brownfield Modification (Offshore, Aberdeen)
description_raw: Brunel are advertising for a senior Project Manager to join a major brownfield modifications programme on a UKCS platform. Based in Aberdeen. The role covers mechanical and subsea modification package management. Outside IR35 engagement. 9-month contract. Target start: as soon as possible. NEC4 contract administration. CEng desirable. Day rate: £800.
